pokemon:lycanroc.name: Lycanroc
pokemon:lycanroc.summary: When properly raised from a young age, it will become a trustworthy partner that will absolutely never betray its Trainer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When properly raised from a young age, it will become a trustworthy partner that will absolutely never betray its Trainer.
With swift movements, this Pokémon gradually backs its prey into a corner. Lycanroc’s fangs are always aimed toward opponents’ weak spots.
Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
This Lycanroc is calm and cautious. The rocks jutting from its mane are razor sharp.
The rocks in its mane are sharper than a knife. Fragments that break off are treasured as good luck charms.
The sharp rocks in its mane can cut like knives. Lycanroc wears its prey down by degrees before finishing them off.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When properly raised from a young age, it will become a trustworthy partner that will absolutely never betray its Trainer.

pokemon:rockruff.name: Rockruff
pokemon:rockruff.summary: This Pokémon has lived with people since times long ago. It can sense when its Trainer is in the dumps and will stick close by its Trainer’s side.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon has lived with people since times long ago. It can sense when its Trainer is in the dumps and will stick close by its Trainer’s side.
This Pokémon intimidates opponents by striking the ground with the rocks on its neck. The moment an opponent flinches, Rockruff attacks.
It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.
This Pokémon can bond very strongly with its Trainer, but it also has a habit of biting. Raising a Rockruff for a long time can be challenging.
When it rubs the rocks on its neck against you, that’s proof of its love for you. However, the rocks are sharp, so the gesture is quite painful!
As they develop, their disposition grows more violent and aggressive. Many Trainers find them too much to handle and abandon them.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon has lived with people since times long ago. It can sense when its Trainer is in the dumps and will stick close by its Trainer’s side.
